text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Inari One to the infirmary after she gets
injured during training.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a break, it's only a li'l scrape! A little spit
and grit and I'll be as good as new!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I can't be sittin' on my butt all day. Let's hurry and
get back to trainin'!
choice_data_list: You need to get proper rest.
We can continue, but in moderation.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What're you talkin' about? I'm tellin' ya I'm fine!
choice_data_list:
You'll only make things worse if something bad
happens.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Geez. Never took ya for such a worrywart!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Seriously, do you have to sit next to me with that gloomy expression? Fine... I'll take the day off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One goes back to her dorm with a miserable
look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I told ya not to worry! Right, time to get my head
back in the game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I only tasked her with a light run to
check her condition, Inari One's face contorts
with pain.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so the pain's back... but I can still work
through it, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess you've got a point. Best to do as I'm told and play it smart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I cut our training session short, Inari One
slumps her shoulders and trudges back to the
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Howzat, Boss? No problem if I just keep it
light, eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Howzat, Boss? No problem if I just keep it
light, eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm an Edo girl, born and bred! No way a li'l injury
like this'll stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While monitoring her injury, Inari One completes
a light training session.
